notes: Two real findings: removal of the public C_CREATE_RUN_TIME_CONFIG constant (compile break for external refs) and the open question that configBuilder(false,false) disables auto-discovered sources/converters for the bootstrap phase. The remaining five items are descriptive-not-findings: ExtensionLoader:735 and RunTimeConfigurationGenerator:480 merely narrate the change and conclude it 'aligns/matches'; StartupActionImpl:85 describes the rename with no actionable risk; the C_READ_CONFIG and build-item-ordering questions are answerable from the diff (all callers updated, ordering is clearly linear) so they read as vacuous 'please verify' prompts. Missed the human's central concern: safe publication/thread-safety of the generated static INSTANCE/config-root fields written in createBootstrapConfig and read from a separate startup task.
